category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates ASCII-art representations of mathematical equations; official homepage describes asciiTeX as an ASCII equation renderer with LaTeX-like syntax.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the display name asciiTeX; source_facts.executables lists asciiTeX.
docs_sources: Official asciiTeX homepage contains install, usage, options, and syntax documentation.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page for asciiTeX includes a Code section; source_facts.homepage is the matching SourceForge-hosted official site.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official homepage describe ASCII math equation rendering with LaTeX-like syntax and command-line usage.
